source_discovery_first.reason: Attach exact product source URLs before image candidates can be trusted.

replace_generic_source_then_attach_image.reason: Generic storefront URLs need exact product detail pages before image attachment.

image_attachment_ready.reason: Exact product source URLs are present; prioritize image extraction or manual image confirmation.
